artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2022-10-30
artifacts.excerpt:
My 7yo son immediately comes to me for a hug upon waking. I would *never* have done this with my own dad, who I feared and hated in equal measure. This is what breaking cycles looks like. 

To all the dads putting in the work: you’re changing the world. I’m cheering you on! ❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, too, thing, most.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2024-05-13
artifacts.excerpt:
I tell my son (9) over and over again how great it his to be his dad, precisely because that never happened for me. In meeting his needs, I can also heal the Parts of me that needed to hear that and never did. 

You can just break generational curses. https://t.co/feXicvEHFf
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, too, thing, most.

Long after the child leaves home, they carry this self-abandonment with them.

planets.name: Love
planets.summary: Archive cluster around love: 149 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2023-03-22
artifacts.excerpt:
My son plays a game of running off to school in the morning without my hugs. Because he knows I will.

And I burst into tears at the little boy inside my own body, keening at the void where a father's love was never known.

And so I get to parent two boys, now. Him, and me.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: love, body, see, self.

artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt:
PSIP (Psychedelic Somatic Interactional Psychology) was developed by former MDMA trial therapist Saj Razvi. Some MDMA recipients experienced no classic symptoms of love, empathy, connection. They’d feel nothing, for most or all of a session.

Nothing.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: love, body, see, self.

artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2024-06-28
artifacts.excerpt: Celebrating 19 years of marriage to the love of my life today. So, so grateful.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: love, body, see, self.

artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt: What I love about PSIP is that it’s a skillful model, not focused on any particular medicine, but rather on outcomes, sensitively-applied technique, and trauma research. It makes sense of why the old "hands-off" model of psychedelic tripping does not work for everyone.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: love, body, see, self.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt:
Now we get back to Saj, and dissociation, or States 3/4 as we now know them. State 3 is associated with depression, but State 4 is total unfeeling numbness, equivalent to ~4x the amount of morphine given for breakthrough pain in the hospital.

Psychedelics have no effect here.

planets.name: Don
planets.summary: Archive cluster around don: 121 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt:
But if humans don't feel safe in our herd (our families and communities) we can’t and won’t get back to 0. We get PTSD: undischarged ANS energy looping and retriggering as we confuse these stuck energies for threat itself.

Ongoing threat and abuse compounds this.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, need.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt:
But you don’t have to wait for lawmakers or scientists to give you permission to heal. Your body already knows how, and Saj's PSIP model can help you to let it.

Learn to go solo like me, or find a PSIP trained therapist: https://t.co/ctFG5L1EsO
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, need.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-03-29
artifacts.excerpt:
Discovered that Bill Hamilton's classic "Saints and Psychopaths" has recently been digitized. Gratitude. (Link in next tweet)

Skip straight to the checklist even if you don't want to read it. https://t.co/3rvukTvZGw
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, need.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt: Unfortunately, the politics of psychedelic research means that only drug efficacy is being studied. We have to control for technique (and don’t even get started on blinding) or we’re Not Doing Science. If you don’t get better, you’re an obstruction to Moving Forward.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, need.
